books.title: Fear of God
books.description: The fear of the Lord as it related to the promised Messiah was predicted by Isaiah 800 years before his birth.

books.title: Prayer
books.description: Prayer may be defined as the mutual articulated communication between God and man. It is mutual — a two-way affair.

books.title: Life in the Spirit
books.description: For those who knew Ted Gibson and sat under his ministry, these Bible studies will be redolent of his character and style.
